name: Cherry Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together to form a stiff paste.
2. Drain cherries well and roll the paste around each cherry.
3. Roll the coated cherries in crushed graham cracker crumbs until evenly coated.
Note: The recipe calls for 1/2 cup of soft butter, but it has been normalized to 3/4 cup for better consistency with the other ingredients.
